> Template — seeds stub nodes for product management patterns and document templates.
> Each ## section → one ChromaDB node. Project scope — product knowledge is project-specific by nature.

## PRD Template
### Theory
_Stub — structure for a Product Requirements Document: problem, goals, scope, user stories, AC._
### Definition
_Stub — required sections: Overview, Problem Statement, Goals, Non-Goals, User Stories, Acceptance Criteria, Open Questions._
### Code Pattern
_Stub — PRD markdown template._

## User Story Template
### Theory
_Stub — canonical user story format: As a [role], I want [action], so that [benefit]._
### Definition
_Stub — story anatomy: title, description, acceptance criteria, out of scope._
### Code Pattern
_Stub — user story template._

## Acceptance Criteria
### Theory
_Stub — given/when/then format; one criterion per observable behavior._
### Definition
_Stub — what makes a good AC: specific, testable, scoped to one behavior._
### Code Pattern
_Stub — AC template with examples._

_Stub — required sections: happy path, error paths, empty state, permissions._

_Stub — feature spec template._

## Release Notes Template

### Definition
_Stub — required sections: highlights, improvements, bug fixes, known issues._
### Code Pattern
_Stub — release notes template._

## Product Decision Log
### Theory
_Stub — lightweight ADR for product decisions: context, decision, trade-offs._
### Definition
_Stub — required fields: date, decision, rationale, trade-offs, owner._
### Code Pattern
_Stub — decision log entry template._

## OKR Template
### Theory
_Stub — Objective + Key Results format; how to write measurable KRs._
### Definition
_Stub — Objective: qualitative aspiration. Key Result: quantitative, time-bound._

_Stub — OKR template._
